mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_skill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND skill_id = #{skillId}
SELECT * FROM user_skill WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY installed_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_skill (user_id, skill_id, is_installed, installed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skillId}, #{isInstalled}, #{installedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_skill SET is_installed=#{isInstalled}, installed_at=#{installedAt} WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND skill_id=#{skillId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_skill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND skill_id = #{skillId}
